basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.). Candidates with B.Tech can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 26-05-2026. For detailed information please visit IIT Delhi official website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech or equivalent in Mechanical Engineering. Desirable: Masters' degree in Mechanical Engineering.
